summary: Executed backend pytest regression and frontend Playwright integration checks for collaborative editor flows. Core editing, comments, annotation save, drag reorder, multi-select glow, minimap, slash palette, and AI ghost accept are working. Found publish UX false-failure and timeline restore-button accessibility issues.

minor.issue: Pytest websocket test skipped because websocket client module is unavailable in environment; UI-level websocket/presence still validated via frontend tests.

ui_bugs.issue: Restore button is rendered outside viewport at 1920x1080 and cannot be clicked in automation/user flow when preview mode is active.
Invalid nested interactive elements (<button> inside <button>) produce runtime console/hydration warnings.

integration_issues.issue: UI shows failure toast "Could not publish the shared cut." even though backend /api/document/publish returns 200 and publish succeeds.

issues: Primary restore CTA is not fully reachable/visible in standard desktop viewport (1080p), reducing functional discoverability and keyboard/mouse usability.

action_items: In handlePublish, decouple clipboard copy failure from publish success path (clipboard rejection should not trigger publish error state).
Fix VersionTimeline layout so timeline restore CTA is fully clickable within standard desktop viewport.
Refactor PresenceMinimap markup to avoid button-inside-button nesting (use non-button wrapper/div for card or inner dot).
Optionally add websocket client dependency for backend websocket pytest to remove skip in CI regression.
critical_code_review_comments: EditorWorkspace.handlePublish wraps both publish API call and clipboard write in one try/catch; clipboard permission errors incorrectly mark successful publish as failed.
PresenceMinimap contains nested button semantics which is invalid HTML and can cause hydration/runtime inconsistencies.
VersionTimeline fixed footer width/position causes restore action to be effectively inaccessible at common viewport heights.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST comments and TEST annotations through API/UI during test execution.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API health is stable (5/5 passing API tests). Frontend core editor interactions are mostly working. Reproduce publish false-error by clicking share/publish and checking toast text; backend still logs 200. Published page itself is working when loaded directly and after wait. Timeline restore remains blocked by viewport positioning.
rca of the issue: Publish false-error RCA: handlePublish awaits navigator.clipboard.writeText after successful API publish inside same try block; clipboard permission rejection throws and routes to catch, showing failure toast despite successful backend publish+state update. Timeline restore RCA: fixed bottom timeline CTA renders outside visible viewport bounds at 1080p; click attempts fail with out-of-viewport errors.
